MediaKind.description: How the transcript entered the system.
MediaKind.title: MediaKind

description:
A stored meeting transcript owned by the consultant who ingested it. The text is sensitive:
it is stored encrypted at rest and only ever returned to its owner. `transcriber_ref` records
which adapter produced it ('pasted' for text) so a re-transcription is traceable.

engagement_id.description: The engagement this meeting belongs to, if linked.
engagement_id.title: Engagement Id

owner_consultant_id.description: The consultant who owns this resource. Data scoping is by this field, enforced in the repository layer and tested from day one.
owner_consultant_id.title: Owner Consultant Id

text.description: Transcript plaintext (owner-only; stored encrypted at rest).
text.title: Text

transcriber_ref.description: The adapter/version that produced the text ('pasted' for text).
transcriber_ref.title: Transcriber Ref

title: MeetingTranscript
